ValidationRule.description: Win-Back Opportunity field mandatory for Closed Lost Contractor & Non-Auto Renewal Opportunity
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Customer_Opportunity', RecordType.DeveloperName= 'Non-Auto_Renewal_Opportunity'), ISCHANGED(StageName), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Lost'), ISPICKVAL(Win_Back_Opportunity__c,"") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV12: Please confirm whether a Win-Back Opportunity will need to be created 45 days before the Policy End Date for this Lost Opportunity.
